results.title: Men’s mental health month 2026: When ‘I’m fine’ isn’t the whole story, 6 conversations experts recommend
results.description: Despite growing mental health awareness, many men still struggle in silence, often conditioned to hide vulnerability. This Men's Mental Health Month, experts emphasize that life-changing conversations can start with simple, genuine check-ins. Asking about coping mechanisms, what's weighing on their minds, or if expectations are overwhelming can open crucial dialogues, fostering support and encouraging men to seek help when needed.

results.title: Indian brothers arrested in Saudi Arabia for donating money to Iran
results.description: A family in Uttar Pradesh's Amroha has said that two of its members have been arrested in Saudi Arabia for donating money to Iran.

results.description: Israel is working on a long-term cultural project to install a statue of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj in one of its major cities, a move aimed at strengthening people-to-people ties between India and Israel. The announcement was made by Israel's Consul General

results.title: Odisha CM Writes to West Bengal CM to Drop “Dham” from Digha Jagannath Temple Name
results.description: Odisha Chief Minister Mohan Charan Majhi has written to West Bengal Leader of Opposition Suvendu Adhikari, requesting the removal of the word “Dham” from the name of the Digha Jagannath Dham temple complex in Purba Medinipur. Majhi said the naming has hurt the religious sentiments of millions of devotees of Mahaprabhu Shree Jagannath across Odisha [...] The post Odisha CM Writes to West Bengal CM to Drop “Dham” from Digha Jagannath Temple Name appeared first on Pragativadi I Latest Odisha News in English I Breaking News .

results.title: DU Student Arrested For Supplying Hydroponic Marijuana To College Students
results.description: A 22-year-old Delhi University student was arrested in north Delhi with 195 grams of hydroponic marijuana, valued at Rs 20 lakh. He allegedly supplied the drug, known as OG, to college students to fund a lavish lifestyle. Police are investigating the supply chain.

results.title: Matt Smith, Emma D'Arcy, Olivia Cooke Bring The Glam At 'House Of The Dragon' London Premiere | N18G
results.description: 'House Of The Dragon' madness took over London on Monday evening as the star-studded cast gathered for the grand premiere of Season 3. Stars Matt Smith, Emma D'Arcy, Olivia Cooke, Steve Toussaint and several other cast members stepped out to celebrate the highly anticipated return of the hit 'Game Of Thrones' prequel. Check out all the highlights here.

results.title: FPI inflows into FAR securities rise by Rs 8,795 cr after govt tax exemption move
results.description: Foreign investors are pouring money into Indian government bonds. This follows a tax exemption on interest and capital gains for investments in Fully Accessible Route securities. The government's move aims to attract foreign capital and support the rupee. These measures are opening up India's bond market to global investors. This is a significant development for India's debt market.
